doctrines.title: The Idempotency Doctrine
doctrines.notes: Machine-checkable layers: deterministic verification scripts and synchronized inventory.

doctrines.title: The Calibrated Truth Doctrine
doctrines.notes: Claim calibration maps to evidence ledger states and MATRIX-backed evidence refs.

doctrines.title: The Census Doctrine
doctrines.notes: Inventory is the canonical census for governance artifacts and project overlays.

articles.title: Bill of Rights
articles.notes: Rights to truth and safety tie to agent constraints and evidence states.

articles.title: Execution Law
articles.notes: Code governance and truth-status tie to registry and enforcement map.

articles.title: Purpose Law
articles.notes: Verification-before-done requires executable checks and ledger evidence.

articles.title: Separation of Powers
articles.notes: Agent republic: machine-readable capabilities and executable enforcement.

articles.title: Amendment Process
articles.notes: Amendments must update mappings and keep inventory synchronized.
